Serialized Form

  • Package BusinessLayer

    • Class BusinessLayer.Canvas

      class Canvas extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • activeTool
          String activeTool
          Currently selected tool
        • circuit
          Circuit circuit
          Circuit simulator instance
        • components
          ArrayList<Component> components
          Component and Connector Arraylist
        • connectorOffsetX
          int connectorOffsetX
          Offsets for dragging connectors
        • connectorOffsetY
          int connectorOffsetY
          Offset for connectors when drawing.
        • connectors
          ArrayList<Connector> connectors
        • dragging
          boolean dragging
          Drag state flags
        • draggingEnd
          boolean draggingEnd
        • draggingStart
          boolean draggingStart
        • draggingWhole
          boolean draggingWhole
        • offsetX
          int offsetX
          Offsets for dragging components
        • offsetY
          int offsetY
          Offsets for dragging components
        • pressX
          int pressX
          Initial mouse press positions
        • pressY
          int pressY
          Initial mouse press positions
        • selectedComponent
          Component selectedComponent
          Currently selected component
        • selectedConnector
          Connector selectedConnector
          Currently selected connector

  • Package UserInterfaceLayer

    • Class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer

      class CircuitExplorer extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • canvas
          Canvas canvas
          Reference to the canvas displaying the current circuit.
        • circuitList
          JList<String> circuitList
          The list component displaying circuit names.
        • circuitModel
          DefaultListModel<String> circuitModel
          The model backing the circuit list.
        • project
          Project project
          Reference to the project containing circuits.

    • Class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow

      class MainWindow extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • palette
          Palette palette
          Palette panel containing circuit components/tools

      class Palette extends JPanel implements Serializable

      class TruthTableDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable
